title: 第 146 節
en: 'My fourteenth name is He in whom there is no harm*.
'My fifteenth name is the unconquerable One.
' My sixteenth name is He who makes the true account".
' My seventeenth name is the All-seeing One.
' My eighteenth name is the healing One.
'My nineteenth name is the Creator.
' My twentieth name is Mazda (the All-knowing One).
9. ' Worship me, O Zarathurtra, by day and by ^ Asha-Vahijta, which is the name of ^e second AmeshaSpenta too. The commentary has : * That is*, my own being is all holiness.'
The same construction is used with regard to the eighth, the tenth, and the nineteenth names.
' ' It follows from this passage that a man is not fit to be a king, unless he possesses twelve virtues ' (Phi. tr.).
' 'That is, I make the account of good works and sins' (Phi. tr.); praka/am gaitan&karas kila puifyapdpayos sankhyim aham karomi (Sansk. tr.). Cf. Yasna XXXII, 6, b.
26 YAiJTS AND s!r6zAHS.

night, with offerings of libations well accepted \ I will come unto thee for help and joy, I, Ahura Mazda ; the good, holy Sraosha will come unto thee for help and joy; the waters, the plants, and the Fravashis of the holy ones will come unto thee for help and joy.

ID. 'If thou wantest, O Zarathu^tra, to destroy the malice of Da6vas and Men, of the Yitus and Pairikas, of the oppressors, of the blind and of the deaf % of the two-legged ruffians ^ of the two-legged Ashemaoghas *, of the four-legged wolves ;

II. 'And of the hordes with the wide front, with the many spears *, with the straight spears, with the spears uplifted, bearing the spear of havock ; then, recitie thou these my names every day and every night.

^ Yasd-bereta: pr&ptenia dSinenzij^ \j-i!-J^^ *^^- those ' who cannot see nor hear anything of God.' ' Those terms were current in the theological language of the Sassanian times to designate the unbelievers. An edict, promulgated by king Yazdgard III (fifth century a. c.) to make Zoroastrism the state religion in Armenia, had the following words : ' You must know that any man who does not follow the religion of Mazda is deaf, blind, and deceived by Ahriman's devs * (Elisaeus, The War of Vartan).
' Or murderers (mairya); according to the Parsis highwaymen (^ »p.

the deceiver (irlft&r), the self-willed (khdt ddshak), and the deceived (frfftak). The first and worst is one who knowingly leads i>eople astray, making forbidden what is lawful, and lawfiil what is forbidden ; the second is one who follows his own will and reason, instead of applying to a DastAr (a spiritual guide) for direction ; the third is one who has been led astiay by another* ' Drafja means also banner: the Persian v>4;>i derived from drafxa, has preserved the two meanings. The Sanskrit translation has ^ a sir a, the Persian has .V^.
ORMAZD YAST. 2J 12. *I am the Keeper*; I am the Creator and the Maintainer*; I am the Discerner'; I am the most beneficent Spirit.
' My name is the bestower of health; my name is the best bestower of health.
'My name is the Athravan*; my name is the most Athravan-like of all Athravans.
' My name is Ahura (the Lord).
Holy.
most Glorious.
the Fullest-seeing.
Farthest-seeing.
13. * My name is the Protector; my name is the Well-wisher; my name is the Creator; my name is the Keeper; my name is the Maintainer.
'My name is the Discerner; my name is the Best Discerner.
name is the Word of Prosperity*.
'My name is the King who rules at his will;
zh: 我的第十四個名號是無害之者（*He in whom there is no harm*）。
「我的第十五個名號是不可戰勝者。」
「我的第十六個名號是『彼者，使真實之記述』」。
我的第十七個名號是全知者（All-seeing One）。
我的第十八個名號是「療癒者」(Shāfī)。
我的第十九個名號是造物者（the Creator）。
我的第二十個名號是瑪茲達（Mazda，全知者）。
9. 「祆教聖者瑣羅亞斯德啊，願你日夜崇拜我，以阿舍-瓦希斯塔（Asha-Vahijta）之名崇拜我，這也是第二位阿梅沙·斯彭塔（Amesha Spenta）的名號。評注曰：『蓋言吾之本質乃至聖者也。』」
同樣的構造方式也用於第八、第十及第十九個名號。
「由這段經文可知，一個人若不具備十二種美德，就不適合為王。」（斐洛譯文）。
'即是說，我計算善業與罪業'（斐洛譯本）；praka/am gaitan&karas kila puifyapdpayos sankhyim aham karomi（梵文譯本）。參照《雅斯納》第三十二章第六節 b。
26 瑜伽士與蘇菲行者
夜間，以受納良好的奠酒供養為之 \ 我將為助益與喜樂而來就汝，我，阿胡拉‧瑪茲達（Ahura Mazda）；善良、聖潔的斯拉歐沙（Sraosha）將為助益與喜樂而來就汝；諸水、諸植物，以及聖者之弗拉瓦什（Fravashis）將為助益與喜樂而來就汝。
【ID】「若汝欲毀滅邪惡之力，喔，瑣羅亞斯德（Zarathu^tra），毀滅掉惡魔（Da6vas）與人類、雅圖（Yitus）與仙女妖精（Pairikas）、壓迫者、盲者與聾者、雙足之匪徒、雙足之無恥者（Ashemaoghas）、四足之狼；
II. 「以及那些前陣寬闊、持矛眾多、長矛筆直、矛尖高舉、揮舞災厄之矛的軍隊*；爾當每日每夜誦念我之名號。
^ Yasd-bereta：那些「既不能看見也不能聽聞上帝任何事物」的人。這些術語在薩珊王朝時代的神學語言中流行，用以指稱不信者。五世紀時亞茲德格德三世國王頒布的敕令，旨在使祆教成為亞美尼亞的國教，其中有如下措詞：「你必須知道，任何不遵循馬茲達宗教的人是聾的、盲的，並被阿赫里曼的魔鬼所欺騙」（埃利賽烏斯《瓦爾坦之戰》）。
或者兇手（mairya）；根據祅教徒的說法是強盜（^ »p.

欺騙者（irlft&r）、自我專制者（khdt ddshak）與被欺騙者（frfftak）。第一種最為惡劣者，乃是故意誤導他人者，將禁止之事視為許可，將許可之事視為禁止；第二種乃是遵循自己的意志與理性者，而非向 Dastur（精神導師）請求指引；第三種乃是已被他人誤導者。*Drafja 亦有旗幟之義：波斯詞彙 v>4;>i 源自 drafxa，保留了兩種含義。梵文譯本作 ^ a sir a，波斯文譯本作 .V^。
歐瑪茲德讚歌（Ormazd Yast）2.12 我是守護者；我是創造者與維持者；我是分辨者；我是至善的靈。
我的名字是賦予健康者；我的名字是最好的賜予健康者。
「我的名字是阿薩樂凡（Athravan）；我的名字是所有阿薩樂凡中最具阿薩樂凡特性的。
我的名字是阿胡拉（主宰）。
聖。
最榮耀者。
最圓滿之見者。
遠見者。
13. * 我的名號是護衛者；我的名號是善願者；我的名號是創造者；我的名號是守護者；我的名號是維持者。
「我的名號是識別者；我的名號是最殊勝的識別者。
名字就是繁榮的聖言*。
我的名號是隨心統治的國王（*Ren-a apu-s heka em kheft-f*）；
